items.name: Filesystem MCP template
items.summary: Expose a bounded local directory through a filesystem MCP server after the user chooses an allowed root.

reasons: stdio MCP starts a local command
filesystem access depends on the user-selected allowed root

permissions.label: Local command
permissions.detail: Requires explicit MCP server configuration before any process starts

permissions.label: Filesystem access
permissions.detail: The allowed root must be configured by the user

notes: Capability Center may generate a disabled draft only after the user provides allowedRoot.

items.name: HTTP API channel template
items.summary: Create a local HTTP ingress account for controlled automation requests after an API key and privacy mode are configured.

reasons: External requests can enter the agent inbox
The account requires a secret API key and privacy policy

permissions.label: External ingress
permissions.detail: Requests are accepted only after account configuration

permissions.label: Secret storage
permissions.detail: API key must be created in Channels settings

notes: Template only. Capability Center must route setup to Channels settings.

items.name: Meeting summary workflow template
items.summary: A local workflow recipe shape for turning connected calendar or channel context into a structured meeting summary.

reasons: Workflow quality depends on configured connectors and channel privacy mode

permissions.label: Connector dependent
permissions.detail: Uses only capabilities the user has already configured

notes: Template only. P0 does not install workflow recipe files.
